title: brachyscome tesquorum
intro: Brachyscome tesquorum, also known as the small white daisy or Tasmanian daisy, is a species of daisy native to Australia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Brachyscome tesquorum include reducing inflammation, soothing digestive issues, and providing relief from skin irritations. Brachyscome tesquorum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture to harness its medicinal properties and health benefits.
